## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.

Closes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (new model, operator, backend)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / build system change

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style (clang-format)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass with `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] The build completes successfully on Linux with CUDA
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Tested on CPU backend
- [ ] Tested on CUDA backend
- [ ] Tested with real model(s):

## Additional context

Add any other context about the pull request here.
